name: recruitment-portal-backend
description: Government Recruitment & Examination Management Portal - Backend API (Microservices)

scripts.install:all: cd apps/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../identity-service && npm install && cd ../recruitment-service && npm install && cd ../communication-payment-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,IDENTITY,RECRUIT,COMM" -c "cyan,green,blue,magenta" "npm run gateway" "npm run identity" "npm run recruitment" "npm run communication"
scripts.restart: npm run kill-ports && npm run dev
scripts.kill-ports: powershell -Command "@(5000,5001,5002,5003) | ForEach-Object { $p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \"Freed port $_\" } }"
